WaitlistEntry.title: WaitlistEntry
WaitlistEntry.description: Details of parents who signed up for the waitlist.

parentName.description: The custom full name of the parent.

phone.description: The WhatsApp / Mobile number of the parent.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the parent joined the waitlist.

syncedToSheets.description: Tracks whether the record has been synced to Google Sheets.

/waitlist/{entryId}.description: Contains list of waitlist entries submitted by parents
